Lifestyle education regarding hypertension28-May-1993Essential hypertension (disorder)

Diabetes self management plan10-Apr-1992Prediabetes (finding)
  • Patient will demonstrate understanding of diabetes self-management principles including diet, exercise, medication adherence, and blood glucose monitoring.
  • Maintain or achieve HbA1c at individualized target level.
  • Achieve and maintain a healthy weight as part of diabetes self-management.
  • Maintain blood pressure within target range as part of diabetes self-management.
  • Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week as part of diabetes self-management.
